notes: Captured public Admin GraphQL 2026-04 File interface fields for an IMAGE and a generic FILE created through fileCreate, then read back through files(first: 2, reverse: true, sortKey: ID). Public 2026-04 exposes updatedAt and fileErrors on File, mimeType on MediaImage and GenericFile, and Media interface errors/warnings only on MediaImage; displayName, updateStatus, fileWarnings, presentation, and connectedResources* are not public File fields in this schema.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a local MediaImage GID; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live update timestamp.
Shopify returns null for mimeType in the immediate create payload; the proxy derives it from the accepted filename/source.
Shopify returns null for the image object while processing; the proxy keeps the accepted external image source immediately.
The proxy generates a local GenericFile GID; Shopify returns the dev-store GenericFile GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live update timestamp.
Shopify returns null for mimeType in the immediate create payload; the proxy derives it from the accepted filename/source.
Shopify returns null or a CDN URL while processing generic files; the proxy keeps the accepted external file source.
The proxy generates a local GenericFile GID; Shopify returns the dev-store GenericFile GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live update timestamp.
Shopify advances file processing asynchronously; the proxy keeps the staged create status.
Shopify returns its CDN file URL once the generic file is processed; the proxy keeps the accepted external file source.
The proxy generates a local MediaImage GID; Shopify returns the dev-store MediaImage GID.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live creation timestamp.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns the live update timestamp.
Shopify advances file processing asynchronously; the proxy keeps the staged create status.
Shopify returns its CDN media URL once the image is processed; the proxy keeps the accepted external image source.
